untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition (top formation detection) which cannot be expressed with allowed indicators. Requires identifying specific candlestick/price patterns at highs, measuring trend duration in days, and detecting pattern breakouts - these are structural pattern detections not available in the indicator set. Also, exit condition 'ultimate low reached then rebounds' requires multi-bar pattern detection unavailable with point-in-time indicators.
translation_notes: BULKOWSKI_DRY_0 describes a visual reversal pattern (tops with downward breakouts) requiring custom pattern detection logic. The 113-day bull trend and 70-day bear trend preconditions, the top formation itself, and the ultimate low reversal exit are all pattern-dependent concepts that fall outside the scope of technical indicator-based rules. A full implementation would require a dedicated pattern recognition module.
